title: Supporting Community Independence - Care at Home Framework for Adults - NEW ENTRANTS
description:
West Dunbartonshire Council are seeking to appoint suitably qualified, experienced and registered Providers onto an open and flexible Care at Home Framework for Adults.
The Services required under the terms of this Flexible Framework are those which fall under Self-Directed Support (Scotland) Act 2013 (SDS) Options 2 and 3.
The Service shall be delivered in a range of ways including providing personal care, personal support and housing support within Supported Persons own homes, 24 hours a day, 7 days per week, each day per year. title: NP86626 - Swab Collection Devices
description:
VTM is supplied in a colour free plastic (polypropylene) tube containing a prefilled level of transport medium.  VTM is intended to be used for the collection and preservation and/or transportation of clinical specimen (e.g. mucus, sputum, vaginal secretions, faeces, urine) collected from any body part for in vitro diagnostic procedures. Sample Collection Kit 1ml fill VTM
IVD Kit contains prefilled tube containing 1ml of VTM with green screw cap and sterile swab with Breakpoint.
Sample Collection Kit 3ml fill VTM
IVD Kit contains prefilled tube containing 3ml of VTM with green screw cap and sterile swab with Breakpoint. Individual Tubes containing Inactivation Medium
Tube containing 2ml pre-filled level of Inactivation Medium, with RED screw cap.
Inactivation medium is supplied in a colour free plastic (polypropylene) tube containing a prefilled level of inactivation medium.  Inactivation medium is intended to be used for the collection and preservation and/or transportation of clinical specimen (e.g. mucus, sputum, vaginal secretions, faeces, urine) collected from any body part for in vitro diagnostic procedures.  Inactivation medium will KILL (inactivate) both viral and bacterial pathogens. Sample Collection Kit (tube + swab), containing Inactivation Medium
Supplied in IVD Peel Pouch containing 2ml fill of Inactivation medium, with RED screw cap and Sterile dry swab with Breakpoint A Sterile swab is a medical device used to collect specimens from any body part for in vitro diagnostic purposes.
The swab will have a flexible polystyrene shaft with viscose, floxsynthetic or flocked, mini tip, colour white, PCR ready and sterile, with a scored break point and fits securely (once broken) in the tube using a method of capturing the swab securely within the screw cap of tube.
The swab will be supplied in a peel pouch format and marked with CE number or equivalent UKCA, IVD, storage conditions, sterile, manufacture, part number, lot number and expiry date as a minimum, supplied individually or as part of an IVD PCR Sample collection peel pouch kit.
Swabs will be used to collect viral and bacterial targets from various orifices of the human body, such As:
Nasal, throat, ear, cervix, nasopharyngeal, skin, toe nails, vaginal and urethral. This lot captures a range of miscellaneous products, which may be required for use across NHS Scotland’s Laboratory Estate.  The range of products contained within this lot are as follows,
Item 1 	1 Litre bottle inactivation medium (lysis buffer)
Item 2 	Replacement blue screw caps
Item 3 	7ml tube (empty) and loose yellow caps
Item 4 	Individual Sterile packaged dry swabs without break point. - A Sterile swab is a medical device used to collect specimens from any body part for in vitro diagnostic purposes. The swab will have a flexible polystyrene shaft with viscose, flosynthetic or flocked, mini tip, colour white, PCR ready and sterile, with a scored break point and fits securely (once broken) in the tube using a method of capturing the swab securely within the screw cap of tube.
The swab will be supplied in a peel pouch format and marked with CE number or equivalent UKCA, IVD, storage conditions, sterile, manufacture, part number, lot number and expiry date as a minimum, supplied individually or as part of an IVD PCR Sample collection peel pouch kit.
Swabs will be used to collect viral and bacterial targets from various orifices of the human body, such As:
Nasal, throat, ear, cervix, nasopharyngeal, skin, toe nails, vaginal and urethral.
Item 5 	Transport pack UN3373 compliant for various tube sizes – sealed bag for internal transportation.
Item 6	Transport pack UN3373 compliant for various tube sizes – sealed bag with absorption pad for internal and external transportation by courier or Royal Mail.
Item 7 	Transport pack UN3373 compliant for various tube sizes – rigid container for use in securely transporting by courier or Royal Mail.  Material optional, not limited to hard plastic or cardboard.

title: NP16726 Multi Modality Imaging Equipment and Maintenance Framework
description: Supply, Maintenance, Servicing and Repair of Bladder Scanners. Framework Agreement for the supply, installation, and/or maintenance of contrast and radiopharmaceutical injectors and the supply of syringes and other consumables that are used with the above mentioned Injector systems for use with Diagnostic Imaging Equipment. OEM and 3rd Party (Multi Vendor) maintenance and servicing of Diagnostic Imaging Equipment including but not limited to X-Ray, Computed Radiography, CT, MR, PET/CT, Mammography, Fluoroscopy, Lithotripter, Interventional, Dental, Bone Densitometry, Image Intensifier, Nuclear Imaging, Injectors, Specimen cabinets, Digital systems for scoliosis Ultrasound, Linear Accelerators and Bladder Scanners Framework Agreement for the supply, installation, and/or maintenance of mammography vacuum devices and/ or the supply of associated consumables as well as mammography non-wire lesion localisation detectors, mammography non-wire lesion localisation devices, sentinel lymph node location detectors and sentinel lymph node location non-radioactive tracer fluids used in mammography. Supply, Installation (including pre-installation works undertaken as a turnkey contract with the equipment supplier) and maintenance of Diagnostic Imaging & Therapy Equipment including but not limited to X-Ray, Computed Radiography, Angiography, Fluoroscopy, Lithotripsy, CT, MR, PET/CT, Mammography, Lithotripter, Interventional, Dental, Bone Densitometry, Image Intensifiers, Nuclear Imaging, Linear Accelerator   Specimen cabinets, Linacs, Scoliosis Imaging Systems and Ultrasound, Mobile units or modular builds where undertaken as a turnkey contract with the equipment supplier.

title: NHS GGC Radiotherapy Linac
description: Greater Glasgow Health Board (more commonly known as NHS Greater Glasgow and Clyde) has identified a requirement for one (1) Linear Accelerator to replace ageing equipment which has reached the end of its recommended life expectancy at the Beatson Satellite, located at the University Hospital Monklands in Airdrie, Lanarkshire.
